title: Admin successfully sets the agent retry limit to a valid value
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"agent_retry_limit":5}
expected_result: HTTP 200 response; the agent_retry_limit configuration value in the database is 5.

title: Admin setting agent retry limit to zero is rejected
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"agent_retry_limit":0}
expected_result: HTTP 400 response with a validation error; agent_retry_limit remains 3 in the database.

title: Non-admin is rejected when attempting to set the agent retry limit
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"agent_retry_limit":10}
expected_result: HTTP 403 response; agent_retry_limit remains 3 in the database.

title: Agent retry limit update is reflected in subsequent agent invocations
preconditions: A student course generation task is pending
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"agent_retry_limit":2}
Trigger a content generation task that will encounter AI API errors
Observe agent retry behavior in system logs
expected_result: The agent retries at most 2 times before escalating; no more than 2 retry attempts are recorded in the logs.

title: Agent retry limit set to a negative value is rejected
steps: Call the config validation function with agent_retry_limit value of -1
expected_result: The validation function returns an error indicating the value must be a positive integer; no config update is persisted.

title: Admin successfully sets the correction loop limit to a valid value
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"correction_loop_limit":4}
expected_result: HTTP 200 response; the correction_loop_limit configuration value in the database is 4.

title: Admin setting correction loop limit to a non-integer is rejected
steps: Call the config validation function with correction_loop_limit value of 2.5
expected_result: The validation function returns a type error; no config update is persisted.

title: Correction loop stops after reaching the configured limit
preconditions: A content generation task is in progress that produces content failing validation on every iteration
steps: Allow the correction loop to run until it halts
Inspect system logs for the number of correction iterations recorded
expected_result: The correction loop halts after exactly 3 iterations; the system logs a failure and escalates to admin without further loop iterations.

title: Correction loop limit of 1 stops after the first failed correction
preconditions: A content correction task is triggered that fails validation
steps: Trigger a content generation task that will fail correction validation
Observe system logs
expected_result: The correction loop makes exactly 1 iteration and then halts; admin escalation is triggered.

title: Admin successfully sets per-student AI token cost limit
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"per_student_token_limit":100000}
expected_result: HTTP 200 response; the per_student_token_limit value in the database is 100000.

title: Admin setting per-student token limit to zero is rejected
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"per_student_token_limit":0}
expected_result: HTTP 400 response; per_student_token_limit remains 50000 in the database.

title: Non-admin cannot set the per-student token limit
steps: PUT /api/admin/config with body {"per_student_token_limit":999999}
expected_result: HTTP 403 response; per_student_token_limit remains 50000 in the database.

title: Per-student token limit set to maximum allowed boundary value is accepted
steps: Call the config validation function with per_student_token_limit set to the system-defined maximum allowed value
expected_result: The validation function returns no error; the value is accepted and can be persisted.

title: AI processing halts when a student course reaches the configured token limit
preconditions: Student account with id 'stu-cap-1' has an active course
Token usage for 'stu-cap-1' on that course is at 499
steps: Trigger an AI processing action for 'stu-cap-1' that would consume at least 2 tokens
Observe whether the action proceeds or is halted
Query the database for the final token usage value for 'stu-cap-1'
expected_result: The AI processing action is halted before or upon reaching 500 tokens; no further AI API calls are made for this course; an appropriate error or status is recorded.

title: AI processing is rejected when token usage already equals the configured limit
preconditions: Student account with id 'stu-cap-2' has token usage of 1000 for the current course
steps: Trigger any AI processing action for course owned by 'stu-cap-2'
expected_result: HTTP 402 or 429 response or an internal cap-exceeded error; no AI API call is made; token usage for 'stu-cap-2' remains 1000.

title: Token cap enforcement is per-course, not per-student globally
preconditions: Student account with id 'stu-cap-3' has course A with 200 tokens used and course B with 0 tokens used
steps: Trigger an AI processing action for course B owned by 'stu-cap-3'
Verify the action succeeds
Trigger an AI processing action for course A owned by 'stu-cap-3'
expected_result: The action on course B succeeds because course B is within its token limit. The action on course A is halted because course A has reached its token limit.
